Sponsor; second primary ESB vendor (37% BIC); IBM WebSphere; highest pure SOA primary vendor recognition (22% primary SOA vendor); also MQ messaging | Source: IBM (International Business Machines) remains a major publicly traded technology company (NYSE: IBM).
